description:
You are an MLOps engineer who wants to keep every optimization result in a reproducible, machine-readable artifact.  
A colleague has already placed the quadratic coefficients for the experiment in the file

/home/user/experiments/quadratic_coeffs/coefficients.txt

The file contains three whitespace-separated real numbers “a b c” (one line only) representing the quadratic objective  

    f(x) = a x² + b x + c.

Task  
1. Read the three coefficients from the file mentioned above.  
2. Compute  
   • the minimiser x\_min = −b ⁄ (2 a)  
   • the minimal function value f\_min = a x\_min² + b x\_min + c  
3. Write BOTH values into a new JSON file named  

/home/user/experiments/quadratic_coeffs/artifacts/opt_summary.json

with the following exact layout (including spaces, newlines and exactly three digits after the decimal point):

{
  "x_min": 2.000,
  "f_min": -5.000
}

Formatting rules the automatic checker will apply  
• The file must be named opt_summary.json and reside inside /home/user/experiments/quadratic_coeffs/artifacts/  
• The file must consist of exactly three lines:  
  – an opening brace “{” on line 1  
  – the key "x_min" followed by a colon, one space, a number with exactly three digits after the decimal point, a comma, then a newline on line 2  
  – the key "f_min" written the same way but without a trailing comma and followed by a newline and a closing brace “}” on line 3  
• A trailing newline after the closing brace is allowed but not required.  
• Do NOT write any additional keys, comments or whitespace.

Constraint  
Carry out the whole job with ONE single terminal command only (a pipeline or a single line of shell script is fine; no multi-line scripts).  
No manual editing of files is allowed—everything must be done by the single command.

Hints (not commands)  
• You can combine standard UNIX tools (awk, printf, jq, python –c, etc.) in a one-liner.  
• Create the artifacts directory from inside the same command if it does not yet exist.  
• Ensure you round/format the numbers to exactly three digits after the decimal point.

When finished, the opt_summary.json file will serve as the immutable artifact that downstream CI checks will validate.
truth:
Initial state supplied to the agent  
1. Directory /home/user/experiments/quadratic_coeffs/ already exists.  
2. File /home/user/experiments/quadratic_coeffs/coefficients.txt exists with the single line (ending in a newline):

2 -8 3

3. Directory /home/user/experiments/quadratic_coeffs/artifacts/ does NOT exist at start and must be created by the agent’s one-liner.

Required end state for automated verification  
1. File /home/user/experiments/quadratic_coeffs/artifacts/opt_summary.json exists.  
2. Its exact byte content (including newlines) must be:

{
  "x_min": 2.000,
  "f_min": -5.000
}

3. Permissions can be the default ones; no root access is required.
